documentation.text: @notice Helper used by the partner to synchronize marriage.

@notice Helper used by the partner to synchronize divorce.
 @dev Also resets allowance to base as per professor clarification.

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "spouse already married to someone else"

arguments.value: spouse already married to someone else

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "spouse already married to someone else"

documentation.text:
@notice Authorize a lottery contract to modify tax allowance.
 @dev Must be called before lottery can set winner's allowance.

@notice Low-level setter used by trusted contracts (Taxpayer/Lottery).
 @dev Only authorized contracts can call (prevents unauthorized allowance manipulation).
@notice Join the lottery managed by `lot` with randomness `r`.
@notice Reveal the previously committed value to the lottery.
@title Echidna harness for Part 4 (lottery for under-65 taxpayers)
@dev All revealed participants must be valid Taxpayer contracts and under 65.
@dev No address should appear more than once in the revealed list.

@dev Under-65 allowance should never exceed 7000 (prof correction).
 In this harness nobody marries/transfers, so the only possible increases are:
 - birthday at 65 (but then not under-65)
 - lottery winner set to 7000

acknowledgeDivorce(address).notice: Helper used by the partner to synchronize divorce.

acknowledgeMarriage(address).notice: Helper used by the partner to synchronize marriage.

authorizeLottery(address).notice: Authorize a lottery contract to modify tax allowance.

joinLottery(address,uint256).notice: Join the lottery managed by `lot` with randomness `r`.

revealLottery(address,uint256).notice: Reveal the previously committed value to the lottery.

setTaxAllowance(uint256).notice: Low-level setter used by trusted contracts (Taxpayer/Lottery).

acknowledgeDivorce(address).details: Also resets allowance to base as per professor clarification.

authorizeLottery(address).details: Must be called before lottery can set winner's allowance.

haveBirthday().details: At age 65, legal baseline increases from 5000 to 7000.      If married, couple's total increases by 2000 (legal requirement).      Pooling still allows redistribution, but total must reflect legal baselines.

setTaxAllowance(uint256).details: Only authorized contracts can call (prevents unauthorized allowance manipulation).

echidna_allowance_cap_under65().details: Under-65 allowance should never exceed 7000 (prof correction). In this harness nobody marries/transfers, so the only possible increases are: - birthday at 65 (but then not under-65) - lottery winner set to 7000

echidna_no_double_participation().details: No address should appear more than once in the revealed list.

echidna_valid_under65_participants().details: All revealed participants must be valid Taxpayer contracts and under 65.

devdoc.title: Echidna harness for Part 4 (lottery for under-65 taxpayers)
